raw_source.title: Looking For React.js + Blockchain Developers To Build Web3 Gaming Site
raw_source.body:
I have a web3 gaming site and am looking for experienced frontend developers.
Anyone who is interested in my suggestion, please contact me.
Telegram - @spiderman0705

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.body:
https://youtu.be/eIRUlaIaB0U
I've finished my vintage poker blockchain game and have deployed it to my online server. I'd like to invite you to experience all the features of my blockchain game by visiting the testnet:http://43.163.114.175:3001/"

Technical Highlights (Keywords): Web3+
TRON, Hybrid On-chain/Off-chain Architecture (Game logic runs off-chain for speed; settlement and NFT minting occur on-chain), Delegate Signature Pattern, Reinforcement Learning AI (NFSP/CFR), AMM Market Making, DAO Governance, ERC-721 Achievement NFTs, Socket.io Real-time Communication, Full-Stack End-to-End Automated Testing.  

I'm very interested in the position. With my experience in developing a web3 gaming site, I am confident that I can do an excellent job for you.
comments.author: sanfordzhang

raw_source.author: spiderman6689030-png
